name: vegiflow-monorepo
description: VegiFlow — Hệ thống quản lý & chatbot thực phẩm chay

scripts.dev:db: node -e "console.log('Dev uses remote PostgreSQL from DATABASE_URL; no local DB container is started.')"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,admin,landing,chatbot -c green,cyan,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:admin" "pnpm dev:landing" "pnpm dev:chatbot"
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter backend exec -- npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter backend exec -- npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: pnpm --filter backend exec -- npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:studio: pnpm --filter backend exec -- npx prisma studio
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter backend exec -- npx prisma generate
